payload.answer: I found a preference statement about relaxed Sunday listening. Here are repair options rather than a committed update.
citations: For context, I prefer Sonny Rollins over John Coltrane for relaxed Sunday listening.
repair_options: Keep this as a standalone preference note.
Add it as a separate jazz-listening preference without merging it with any existing music preferences.
If there is already a broader jazz preference, preserve both unless you want to clarify whether this is only for relaxed Sunday listening.
